notes: For BG 6.23, the engineering analog does not contradict the traditional meaning. Yoga defined as severance from sorrow-bondage (duḥkha-saṁyoga-viyoga); practice with niścayena and anirviṇṇa-cetasā. Engineering analog: sustained engagement against weariness. STRONG narrow analog.
